title: Oshiri Tantei: Cosmic Front
titleNative: おしりたんてい コズミックフロント
synopsis: Educational collaboration specials between Oshiri Tantei and the documentary show Cosmic Front. Mikku will help the Butt Detective solve a case, while also teaching the newest facts about dinosaur research and space rockets. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Fushigi ‌no ‌Kuni ‌de ‌Alice to: Dive ‌in ‌Wonderland
titleNative: 不思議の国でアリスと -Dive in Wonderland-
synonyms: Alicja w Krainie Czarów: Dive in Wonderland
Alice au pays des merveilles : Dive in Wonderland
synopsis: I'm supposed to be reading the air so I don't screw up, I'm doing what everyone else is doing, Why can't I get things done? Rise Azumino, a university student, was lost in her life, One day, guided by an invitation letter left behind by her late grandmother, she enters “Wonderland". There she meets a girl named Alice and they begin their journey together. Rise meets the White Rabbit, the Caterpillar, the Queen of Hearts, the Trumpeter, the Mad Hatter and the March Hare, Humpty Dumpty, the twins Tweedle Dum and Tweedle Dee, the Cheshire Cat and ...... The residents of Wonderland appear one after another in front of Rise! And the crazy commotion that ensues! What kind of future will Rise choose in this crazy adventure with Alice? This adventure will surely bring a smile to your face tomorrow! (Source: Official Site, Translated)

title: Kung Fu Sock
titleRomaji: Tian Zhen Yu Kung Fu Wa
synopsis: The series follows the adventures of a curious 8-year-old girl named TZ who always dreamed of going on adventures and exploring wonderful places, and then one day she finds an odd-looking sock in her mother’s laundry that…. Talks. It was originally a Kung Fu Master from another world charged with guarding an ancient scroll. When the Master came through a vortex into TZ’s time, his powers were weakened, and he was transformed into a sock. However, when the little girl puts the sock on her foot she transforms into a super heroine – a kick-ass Kung Fu girl, and together they must complete Kung Fu Wa’s mission and follow the ancient scroll to defeat evil and protect their world. (Source: Federation Studios)

title: Fermat Kitchen
synonyms: 2 อัจฉริยะ เมนูคณิตทฤษฏีแฟร์มา
synopsis: Kitada Gaku is a prodigy in Mathematics and a scholarship holder at Wels Private Academy, a renowned institution with a long history in the International Mathematical Olympiad. After a series of unfortunate events, he meets Asakura Kai, a culinary prodigy with his own catering business. What does the future hold for these two geniuses, and how do their paths intertwine with each other's?

synopsis: On the hottest day of summer vacation, the clean freak boy George is taken to the bustling public swimming pool by his parents. There, he sits at the edge of the pool, terrified, until he sees his little sister floating all by herself...

title: TRUST
synopsis: In the near future, as technology takes another leap forward, humanity becomes increasingly immersed in the metaverse. However, with this digital evolution comes a surge in cybercrime. To counter it more effectively, metaverse operators have begun equipping AI with advanced investigative capabilities. Violet, an artificial intelligence designed for interrogations, is assigned a new task: to question a young woman named Mia.

title: BRIDGE -My Little Friends-
synopsis: "I'll let you meet Shiro. I promise!" Jin the cat promised Mugi, who was grieving over the loss of his beloved dog Shiro. Jin loves Mugi very much, and after hearing the story of the Rainbow Bridge from his owner Kageyama, he decided to let Mugi meet Shiro at the end of the rainbow! Will Jin be able to save Mugi from her sadness? He invites the pigeons and squirrels from the neighborhood, and now Jin's big plan begins! (Source: Official site, translated)

title: POP POP CITY
synopsis: The night of a family birthday party. The mother is tired from work and wants to drink a beer as soon as possible. The father is fidgety and keeps an eye on the clock. A little girl is excited about the sumptuous meal and runs around the house. The intercom rings. There, a "new family member" is standing there... (Source: Official site, translated)

title: KICKS AND PUNK
synopsis: "Let's go. In search of treasure" Nike, a punky outsider girl, runs through the city of the future! In a city where the transportation infrastructure has developed dramatically and walking is no longer necessary, Nike runs alone in her favorite sneakers. Her goal is to get sneakers from the legendary manufacturer "Dynameros", which can only be obtained on the black market. As Nike runs despite being chased by a horde of cyber police, a woman appears in front of her. That woman is none other than Sherry, the daughter of the president of "Fractal Walter", a major company that created the era. What kind of story will the encounter between these two opposing people produce? (Source: Official site, translated)

title: Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
titleRomaji: Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
titleNative: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
synopsis: Thirty years ago, the world was nearly destroyed by the sudden appearance of unknown "invasive alien species." Humans and these “invasive species” continue to vie for living space, and while humanity’s safety is currently barely secured, the world could be destroyed at any moment. Living in fear of death and destruction, people go about their daily lives as if trying to avert their eyes from danger and disaster. In this world, the United Nations Hazardous Species Investigation Agency, "EXCEEDS," has begun operations to ward off crises and disasters caused by invasive species. The story begins on the island nation of "Mizuho" in the Far East. Shina Hisase is a young invasive species extermination hunter living on a remote island. What incident will befall Shina, who wishes only to live quietly with her younger sister Setsuna, her sole remaining family member? Note: The first episode aired with a runtime of ~60 minutes as opposed to the standard 24 minute long episode.

title: Xian Di Guilai
synopsis: The young warrior Yun Qingyan disappeared from the world three years ago, but he was actually drawn into the fairy world for three thousand years! With his extraordinary talent, he became the Yun Emperor, one of the ten great fairy emperors. However, because he was tired of the intrigues in the fairy world and missed his family, he decided to return to the human world at all costs. Upon return to the human world, his parents and sister strangely disappeared, and due to an incident whilst traveling from the fairy world to the human world, he lost his magic weapon and his cultivation became almost zero. Major forces took this opportunity to hunt him down. The fairy emperor became the target of public criticism, and his family was in danger! Yun Qingyan relied on his extraordinary fairy emperor talent to refine pills and array formations, study and practice, and overwhelm his enemies. He embarked on an adventure to revive his family, find his relatives, and rectify the mortal world. (Sour
